'''Nocturno''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] citizen of the [[Eternal Empire]] of [[Zakuul]]. A former member of the [[Knights of Zakuul]], she became known as the gladiator in the [[Arena Grand]] of [[Zakuul]] under the title "The Fallen Knight" by [[3630 BBY]]. That year, Nocturno and her protege [[Drake Raven]] were put up against a newcomer known as "[[Alliance Commander|the Mysterious Stranger]]." During the fight in the Arena, Nocturno and Drake were assisted by [[G0-ON Attacker]] and [[G0-ON Abductor]] droids, but were defeated in the seventh round of the Arena fights.<ref name="SWTOR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Nocturno appears in ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Knights of the Fallen Empire]]'' as the seventh boss of "Eternal Championship". She can be bought as a [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] for the player's stronghold as of Update 4.4.<ref name="SWTOR" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Knights of the Fallen Empire]]'' {{1st}}
